flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Maryland Baltimore fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Maryland Baltimore are 45% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($88.2k vs $60.7k).
